name: Barri Agent
description_short: Karlos Ulibarri is a New Mexico-licensed criminal defense and personal injury attorney based in Albuquerque with 23+ years of experience, not a bankruptcy specialist.
description_long: Karlos Ulibarri, Esq. is an Albuquerque-based attorney who received his Juris Doctorate from the University of New Mexico School of Law in 2000 and has been practicing law for over 23 years. He is the owner of Ulibarri Law Office and holds membership with the New Mexico State Bar since 2001. His background includes service as a former criminal defense attorney for the Public Defenders Office for the State of New Mexico, giving him deep knowledge of the criminal justice system and prosecution procedures. Ulibarri specializes primarily in criminal defense law across all charge types, with secondary expertise in personal injury cases and auto accidents. He offers free initial consultations and maintains availability for client questions day and night throughout the greater Albuquerque area. His professional credentials include recognition as a National Trial Lawyers Association Top 100 attorney, Top 100 Diplomat, and Latino Top 10 honoree, plus membership in the New Mexico Criminal Defense Lawyers Association, New Mexico Hispanic Bar Association, and National Association of Criminal Defense Attorneys. However, the website content contains no information about bankruptcy law, bankruptcy filing services, or Chapter 7/Chapter 13 representation—his advertised practice areas are criminal defense and personal injury law. The categorization as a bankruptcy service appears to be an error, as there is no evidence from his professional profile, service descriptions, or bar association memberships that he provides bankruptcy legal services.
address: 2821 Phillips Dr SW ste A, Albuquerque, NM 87121

diagnosis: This attorney is miscategorized. Karlos Ulibarri specializes in criminal defense and personal injury law, not bankruptcy services. Consumers seeking bankruptcy filing assistance, Chapter 7/13 representation, or debt relief should not contact this firm, as the website provides no evidence of bankruptcy law expertise or services.
